sections.paragraph:
interj. onomatopoet., like אֹוי-

(1) of threatening, ho! woe! hei, οἴ, vae! followed by an acc. [“nom. for a voc., see LXX.”], Isa 1:4, הֹוי גֹּוי חֹטֵא “woe to the sinful nation;” Isa 5:8, 11 , 18 , 20 , 21 10:5 28:1 29:1 , 15 Isa 29:15 30:1 31:1 אֶל Jer 48:1 עַל Jer 50:27 Eze 13:3 לְ Eze 13:18.

(2) of lamenting, alas! 1Ki 13:20, הֹוי אָחִי “alas! my brother!” Isa 17:12.

(3) of admonishing, ho! heus! he! Zec 2:10 Isa 18:1 55:1 .
